sglang.title: [Minor] clean up multimodal processor and tokenizer manager
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: Add dsv3 fused a gemm to sgl-kernel
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add dsv3 FusedAGemm min latency kernel for small batch sizes (num_tokens<=16). Adapted from trtllm.
Benchmark
bf16 dsv3 fused a GEMM throughput (TFLOPs):
    num_tokens  torch (bf16)  dsv3_fused_a_gemm
0          1.0      1.222450           1.884813
1          2.0      2.684187

sglang.title: Add @mickqian as the CODEOWNERS of multimodal
sglang.author: merrymercy

sglang.title: Fix stream reasoning parser and Adds Kimi reasoning parser
sglang.author: JustinTong0323
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
To support reasoning parser for moonshotai/Kimi-VL-A3B-Thinking.
Launch server with:
python -m sglang.launch_server --model-path moonshotai/Kimi-VL-A3B-Thinking-2506 --trust-remote-code --reasoning-parser kimi

Modifications
Adds a detector for the Kimi Thinking model format to the reason

sglang.author: finetunej
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
This fixes a possible crash during startup in some environments that looks like this:
2025-06-25 15:01:45  INFO sglang_router_rs::server: src/server.rs:312: 🚧 Initializing Prometheus metrics on 127.0.0.1:29000
2025-06-25 15:01:45  INFO sglang_router_rs::server: src/server.rs:321: 🚧 Initia

sglang.title: [bugfix] fix runtime dropping panic in editable
sglang.author: slin1237
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

This PR fixes a PanicException that occurs when using the sgl-router Python bindings in editable/development mode:

pyo3_runtime.PanicException: Cannot drop a runtime in a context where blocking is not allowed.
This happens when a runtime is dropped from within an asynchronous context.

sglang.title: [CPU] add c++ kernel to bind CPU cores and memory node
sglang.author: chunyuan-w
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Add c++ kernel to bind CPU cores and memory node.
This kernel will be used in #6549.

Modifications

A new OP init_cpu_threads_env is added in sgl-kernel/csrc/cpu/numa_utils.cpp to bind threads and numa node. UT for this OP is added in test/srt/cpu/test_binding.py.
sgl-kernel/csrc/cpu/CMa

sglang.title: Add dsv3 router gemm kernel
sglang.author: Fridge003
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Adapt router gemm kernel from trtllm
Note that this kernel takes two bf16 tensors as input, and outputs a fp32 tensor.

Modifications


 Integrate kernel and add python bindings
 Solve compilation bugs
 Add test/benchmark for kernel

For next PR: Integrate into dspk-r1 fp4

vllm.author: dsikka
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Note:

CMake update is required to cuda_archs_loose_intersection to fix this PR which currently prevents building cutlass_moe_fp4 on b200

Purpose

Add MoE support for nvfp4 compressed-tensors models
When running on a device < sm100, fall-back to use marlin with nvfp4a16/ignoring activations
